_comment: Reviewed-and-accepted guard findings for lumen. guard auto-loads this file when scanning projects/lumen and suppresses matching findings (rule + optional path_contains). Each waiver records why the finding is acceptable. Remove a waiver to re-gate that rule.

waivers.reason: Reviewed unsafe blocks only: read-only mmap of the columnar segment tier (segment.rs, // SAFETY-documented, crc/bounds-checked), rustls mTLS wiring (tls.rs), and Rust-2024 std::env::set_var/remove_var inside #[cfg(test)] helpers (auth.rs/config.rs/raft.rs) guarded by a process-wide lock. No undocumented unsafe in lumen.

Base k8s manifests, the operator CRD defaults, and examples intentionally ship the lumen:latest / relay:latest local-build tags; production deployers pin a real registry tag via the kustomize overlay (see k8s/overlays/template/kustomization.yaml). Pinning a version in the base template would be incorrect.

Dockerfile/Dockerfile.release COPY into a root-owned builder stage and copy the built binary into the runtime image; no application files are owned by an app user at COPY time. --chown hardening is tracked as a follow-up, not a production blocker.
scripts/bench_vs_db.py is a local benchmark harness (not packaged, not part of the served surface); its f-string SQL interpolates only trusted in-script literals against a throwaway local Postgres.
